commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes voice-call stale cleanup to skip live `speaking`/`listening` calls without `answeredAt`, backfills max-duration timers for matching `call.speaking`/`call.speech` events, and adds focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +39, Tests +116. Total +155 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main can reap a `speaking`/`listening` call without `answeredAt`, and the PR-created remaining gap follows through `onTranscriptionReady` -> `speakInitialMessage` -> `speak` without a max-duration timer.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The PR is in the automerge lane and has one narrow, mechanical blocker: extend max-duration backfill from event-only live states to manager-driven live-state transitions before merge.

target.title: fix(voice-call): preserve live Twilio streams in stale reaper
